get.description:
Returns example response data for the processed endpoint.

This endpoint provides a sample of what the actual data format looks like,
useful for API documentation and client development.

The example dynamically includes all known metric keys from ClickHouse.

Query processed data with various filters.

Returns aggregated statistics over time windows including:
- Signal quality metrics
- Performance metrics
- Network information
- Statistical measures for each metric

Policy: If X-Component-ID header is provided, applies policy transformations
for the source component reading from data-storage:clickhouse.

parameters.name: start_time

schema.description: Window start time (Unix timestamp in seconds)
schema.title: Start Time

parameters.description: Window start time (Unix timestamp in seconds)

parameters.name: end_time

schema.description: Window end time (Unix timestamp in seconds)
schema.title: End Time

parameters.description: Window end time (Unix timestamp in seconds)

parameters.name: ip_src

schema.description: Source IP filter: omit for cell-level only, '*' for all per-IP rows, or a specific IP
schema.title: Ip Src

parameters.description: Source IP filter: omit for cell-level only, '*' for all per-IP rows, or a specific IP

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of records to return
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return

get.description:
Query raw data entries between a given start and end time for a specific cell.

This endpoint returns raw entries directly from the database,
limited to a maximum of 50 per request.

Policy: If X-Component-ID header is provided, applies policy transformations
for the source component reading from data-storage:influx.
Return a list of know cell indexes

schema.title: Response Get Processed Data Api V1 Cell Get

get.description:
Get available fields from InfluxDB and ClickHouse.

Returns:
    Dictionary with 'influx' and 'clickhouse' field lists.

Query decision data with filters.

Returns compressed decision data including:
- cell_id: Cell identifier
- id: Decision record ID
- timestamp: When the decision was made
- compression_method: Compression algorithm used (e.g., "gzip")
- compressed_data: Base64-encoded compressed decision JSON

To decompress the data:
1. Decode base64
2. Decompress using the specified compression method
3. Parse resulting JSON

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of records to return
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return
